details.productUrlName: Jermane Pride of the Circus Galaxy Foil

customAttributes.description:
G, T: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature with four or more legs.
1GG, T: Until end of turn, all creatures able to block target creature with four or more legs do so.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 10/7/2022. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: "Don't worry about me, folks! This beauty was well-fed by my predecessor."
